active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — 3 Permanent Fixes LIVE
active.notes: 1) 60s cooldown (was 300s) — staggered rotation, no dead windows. 2) Self-healing watchdog — detects 3 silent cycles, auto-resets, notifies on Telegram. 3) DEX scanner null fix — handles API null responses. Result: 15 alerts/cycle continuous flow. Zero manual intervention ever needed.
